description.value:
A triangular shield with a flat top and tapered point, designed to protect the body from shoulder to mid-thigh while allowing full freedom of movement in the sword arm. The heater's shape provides excellent coverage against angled blows,

Can be slung on back when not in use (takes 1 [Minor] action to ready)

system.specialAbilities: Can be slung on back when not in use (takes 1 [Minor] action to ready)
